column1: The dataset contains 7,043 customer records and 21 columns.
The dataset includes customer demographics, subscribed services, billing information, contract details, and churn status.
No missing values were identified in any column during the Excel data quality check.
All key numerical columns (tenure, MonthlyCharges, TotalCharges) were imported correctly as numeric data types.
No duplicate customer IDs were found, indicating each record represents a unique customer.
The tenure column ranges from 0 to 72 months, suggesting the dataset contains both new and long-term customers.
The Churn column contains two categories: Yes and No, making it suitable for churn analysis.
The Contract column contains three contract types: Month-to-Month, One Year, and Two Year.
The dataset passed initial quality checks and is ready for SQL-based analysis.
